ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tree_species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the tree species */,
  "latin_name" TEXT /* Scientific Latin name of the tree species */,
  "growth_habit" TEXT /* Growth habit of the tree species */,
  "frequency_of_use" TEXT /* Recommended frequency of use in urban environments */,
  "stormwater_management" TEXT /* Stormwater management capabilities of the tree species */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes and considerations for planting and maintenance */,
  "drought_resistance" TEXT /* Indicates the tree's resistance to drought */,
  "pollution_tolerance" TEXT /* Indicates the tree's tolerance to air pollution */,
  "root_growth_area" TEXT /* Indicates the suitability of the tree for urban spaces with limited root growth areas */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the tree in years */,
  "maturity_height" INTEGER /* Average height of the tree at maturity in meters */,
  "maturity_width" INTEGER /* Average width of the tree at maturity in meters */,
  "flowering_period" TEXT /* Period of the year when the tree flowers */,
  "fruiting_period" TEXT /* Period of the year when the tree produces fruit */,
  "wildlife_value" TEXT /* Value to wildlife, such as providing food or habitat */,
  "pruning_requirements" TEXT /* Specific pruning requirements for the tree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cultivars" (
  "cultivar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cultivar */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tree species */,
  "cultivar_name" TEXT /* Name of the cultivar */,
  "disease_resistance" TEXT /* Indicates the cultivar's resistance to diseases */,
  "ornamental_value" TEXT /* Ornamental value of the cultivar */,
  "pruning_requirements" TEXT /* Specific pruning requirements for the cultivar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cultivar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cultivars_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES tree_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "growth_habits" (
  "habit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each growth habit */,
  "habit_name" TEXT /* Name of the growth habit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the growth habit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequency_of_use" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency of use */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency of use */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency of use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stormwater_management" (
  "management_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stormwater management capability */,
  "management_name" TEXT /* Name of the stormwater management capability */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stormwater management capability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("management_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tree_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree planting project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the project is implemented */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  "project_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_goals" TEXT /* Goals and objectives of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tree_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES project_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the project manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the project manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the project manager belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_species" (
  "project_species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-species combination */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tree planting project */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tree species used in the project */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the tree species used in the project */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date when the tree species was planted */,
  "expected_maturity_date" TEXT /* Expected date when the tree will reach maturity */,
  "maintenance_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the maintenance schedule for the species in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_species_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES tree_species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_species_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES tree_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_species_maintenance_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_schedule_id") REFERENCES maintenance_schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance schedule */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tree planting project */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity */,
  "responsible_party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party responsible for the maintenance */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES tree_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_schedules_responsible_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_party_id") REFERENCES maintenance_parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the maintenance party */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the maintenance party */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the maintenance party */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the maintenance party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tree_health_records" (
  "health_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tree species */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tree */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the tree */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inspector */,
  "last_pruning_date" TEXT /* Date of the last pruning activity */,
  "last_fertilization_date" TEXT /* Date of the last fertilization activity */,
  "disease_history" TEXT /* History of any diseases the tree has had */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tree_health_records_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tree_health_records_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES tree_species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the inspector */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the inspector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the inspector belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stormwater_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stormwater impact record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tree planting project */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact on stormwater management */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_measurement" TEXT /* Quantitative measurement of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stormwater_impact_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES tree_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biodiversity_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biodiversity impact record */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tree planting project */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact on urban biodiversity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_measurement" TEXT /* Quantitative measurement of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biodiversity_impact_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES tree_projects ("project_id")
)
